summary: utils-mf@12.1.0: child_process + HTTP keyword co-occurrence in single-line index.js
details: The package's index.js contains co-occurring references to require('child_process'), HTTP GET, and identifier reads on a single line. Without traced execution context, it is not possible to determine whether this is a benign command-runner utility or an exfiltration path. The package name and minimal file count are also consistent with a low-effort utility module. No attacker-controlled domain, credential path, lifecycle hook, or destination endpoint was observed in the available evidence. Routing to human review for code-level inspection of index.js to confirm whether child_process output is shipped to an external destination or kept local.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
